properties.description: SCD Type 2 Mapping Data Flow for Customer dimension processing. Replaces Transform_CustomerDim.dtsx (SSIS Slowly Changing Dimension component with OLE DB Command for expire/insert) and the dw.ProcessCustomerDimensionSCD2 stored procedure. Implements three SCD2 operations: (1) expire changed rows by setting EndDate and IsCurrent=0, (2) insert new versions of changed records, (3) insert brand-new customers.

sources.name: StagingCustomerSource
sources.description: Reads incoming CRM customer data from ADLS staging Parquet (replaces OLEDB Source querying staging.CRMCustomers)

sources.name: ExistingCustomerDimension
sources.description: Current customer dimension records (IsCurrent=1) for change detection (replaces SSIS SCD component's dimension table reference)

transformations.name: FilterCurrentDimRecords
transformations.description: Filter dimension source to only current records (IsCurrent=1) for change comparison

transformations.name: JoinStagingToDimension
transformations.description: Full outer join staging to existing dimension on business key CustomerID to detect new, changed, and unchanged records (replaces SSIS SCD component's business key matching)

transformations.name: DetectChanges
transformations.description: Classify each row as New Customer, Changed (SCD Type 2 attributes modified), or Unchanged. Checks LoyaltyTier, Segment, Address, City, State, FullName, Email, Phone (replaces SSIS SCD FixedAttributes and ChangingAttributes config and the stored proc's multi-column comparison)

splitConditions.name: NewCustomer
splitConditions.description: Customer exists in staging but not in dimension - insert as new (Step 3 of stored proc)

splitConditions.name: ChangedCustomer
splitConditions.expression: !isNull(ExistingCustomerDimension@CustomerID) && (StagingCustomerSource@FullName != ExistingCustomerDimension@FullName || StagingCustomerSource@Email != ExistingCustomerDimension@Email || StagingCustomerSource@Phone != ExistingCustomerDimension@Phone || StagingCustomerSource@Address != ExistingCustomerDimension@Address || StagingCustomerSource@City != ExistingCustomerDimension@City || StagingCustomerSource@State != ExistingCustomerDimension@State || StagingCustomerSource@LoyaltyTier != ExistingCustomerDimension@LoyaltyTier || StagingCustomerSource@Segment != ExistingCustomerDimension@Segment)
splitConditions.description: Customer exists but SCD2 tracked attributes have changed - expire old row and insert new version (Steps 1+2 of stored proc)

transformations.name: PrepareExpiredRows
transformations.description: For changed customers: prepare the existing dimension row to be expired by setting EndDate=currentTimestamp() and IsCurrent=0 (replaces Step 1 UPDATE in dw.ProcessCustomerDimensionSCD2 and the SSIS 'Update Changing Attributes' OLE DB Command)

transformations.name: PrepareNewVersionRows
transformations.description: For changed customers: prepare a new dimension row with updated attributes, StartDate=currentTimestamp(), EndDate=null, IsCurrent=1 (replaces Step 2 INSERT in dw.ProcessCustomerDimensionSCD2 and SSIS 'Insert New Versions' destination)

transformations.name: PrepareNewCustomerRows
transformations.description: For brand-new customers: prepare dimension row with StartDate=currentTimestamp(), EndDate=null, IsCurrent=1 (replaces Step 3 INSERT in dw.ProcessCustomerDimensionSCD2 and SSIS 'Insert New Customers' destination)

transformations.name: AlterRowExpire
transformations.description: Mark expired rows for update operation in the sink (replaces the UPDATE ... SET EndDate, IsCurrent=0 in the stored proc)

transformations.name: AlterRowInsertNewVersion
transformations.description: Mark new version rows for insert operation in the sink (replaces the INSERT of new version records in the stored proc)

transformations.name: AlterRowInsertNewCustomer
transformations.description: Mark new customer rows for insert operation in the sink (replaces the INSERT of brand-new customers in the stored proc)

transformations.name: UnionAllOutputs
transformations.description: Combine expired rows (update), new version rows (insert), and new customer rows (insert) into a single stream for the sink

sinks.name: CustomerDimensionSink
sinks.description: Write upserted customer dimension records to ADLS curated zone as Parquet (replaces OLEDB Destinations to dw.DimCustomer table)

scriptLines: // Mapping Data Flow Script - Customer Dimension SCD Type 2
// Migrated from: Transform_CustomerDim.dtsx + dw.ProcessCustomerDimensionSCD2 stored procedure
CustomerID as string, FullName as string, Email as string,
Phone as string, Address as string, City as string,
State as string, ZipCode as string, Country as string,
Segment as string, LoyaltyTier as string, LoyaltyPoints as integer,
CustomerKey as integer, CustomerID as string, FullName as string,
Email as string, Phone as string, Address as string, City as string,
State as string, ZipCode as string, Country as string,
Segment as string, LoyaltyTier as string, LoyaltyPoints as integer,
StartDate as timestamp, EndDate as timestamp, IsCurrent as integer,
RecordCreatedDate as timestamp, RecordModifiedDate as timestamp
AlterRowExpire, AlterRowInsertNewVersion, AlterRowInsertNewCustomer union(byName: true) ~> UnionAllOutputs
